title: A Neural Network from Scratch with PyTorch Autograd
short_description: Train an MLP by hand -- raw requires_grad tensors, your own matmuls, and manual gradient descent with loss.backward() and a no_grad() update. No nn.Module, no optimizer.
learning_objectives: Write a forward pass by hand with matrix multiplication and sigmoid
Understand what loss.backward() computes and where it stores gradients
Run gradient descent manually inside torch.no_grad()
Know why you must call grad.zero_() every step
prerequisites: Challenge 3 (A Small Neural Network in PyTorch) helps but is not required
